text: Kelly assigns Nex to go undercover at Midori Food — an agricultural company suspected of shipping fake solar cells to power plants across the city. One problem: Nex has failed twenty job interviews.

speaker: Doctor Rat
text: Doctor Rat volunteers to coach him. On interview day, the rat hides in Nex's breast pocket and whispers every answer. It works — until a surprise final test activates. The lab's experimental monster has escaped its tank.
